analysis: Seven nights, every single one of them over six and a half hours, with two nights landing at 7h 56m — you are not out here coasting, you are genuinely putting the work in. Your REM has been quietly impressive, peaking at 2h 34m on the second night and staying mostly solid across the stretch, which means all those wind-down rituals are doing something real for your brain. The one thing worth noticing is that your awake time crept up mid-stretch — 44 minutes, 38 minutes, and then a chunky 1h 8m on the seventh night — before you bounced back beautifully on the last night with only 32 minutes lost. Deep sleep is a little inconsistent, dipping as low as 28 minutes but then jumping to 53 on the sixth night, so there's more to unlock there — but honestly, the fact that you closed the week with nearly 8 hours is the kind of ending that makes the whole stretch worth it.
